title: InfiniteGoldenCarrot
description: Unlimited golden carrots for infinite hunger restoration.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The InfiniteGoldenCarrot plugin introduces an infinite-use golden carrot that can be consumed repeatedly without ever running out. This unique item ensures that players can maintain their food level and saturation, making it perfect for survival gameplay or extended exploration. [Here is a detailed breakdown of the plugin's features.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/58)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
